🏥 Salud 💪 Fitness 📐 Unidades 🧮 Día a día 💶 Finanzas 🔢 Matemáticas

🌤 Everyday Calculators

Useful tools for your daily life, available in one click.

🍽️

Tip Calculator

Calculate the tip and split the bill between any number of people instantly.

 🏷️

Discount Calculator

Calculate the final price after any discount and see exactly how much you save.

 🎂

Age Calculator

Find out your exact age in years, months and days from your date of birth.

 ⏱️

Hours Calculator

Add or subtract hours and minutes. Calculate hours worked between two times.

 🔐

Password Generator

Generate strong, random passwords instantly with customisable options.

 📝

Word Counter

Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs in any text instantly.
